headline: Saudi East-West pipeline hits 7 mln bpd amid Hormuz disruption, Bloomberg
summary: Investing.com — Saudi Arabia’s East-West crude pipeline, a key route that bypasses the Strait of Hormuz, is now operating at its full capacity of about 7 million barrels per day, according to Bloomberg, citing a person familiar with the matter.

headline: Trend followers are accumulating equity shorts, new report shows
summary: Investing.com — Trend-following funds are building up short positions in equities, highlighting growing caution among systematic investors as markets grapple with elevated volatility and macro uncertainty, according to BofA.

headline: S&P 500: Goldman Sachs says this is the key question in Q2
summary: Investing.com -- U.S. equities are navigating a complex landscape of compressed valuation multiples and resilient corporate fundamentals as the market prepares for the first-quarter earnings season of 2026.
